# Sam Okafor — DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer

SRE with 7 years keeping large-scale cloud infrastructure reliable and observable.

## Skills
Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, AWS, GCP, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD), Prometheus,
Grafana, Linux, Bash, Python, Go, incident response, observability, infrastructure as code.

## Experience
**Site Reliability Engineer — Cloud platform (2020–present)**
Ran multi-region Kubernetes clusters with 99.99% uptime. Built Terraform modules for
infra provisioning and Prometheus/Grafana dashboards for observability. Led on-call and
incident response, cutting mean time to recovery by half.

**DevOps Engineer — SaaS company (2017–2020)**
Automated CI/CD pipelines and migrated workloads to AWS with infrastructure as code.

## Looking for
Remote SRE / DevOps / platform reliability roles.
